description: Django web application for browsing movies and submitting reviews

customInstructions.review: Check models.py, views.py, services.py, forms.py, and tests when making changes.
customInstructions.test: Run 'pytest' to verify changes. Add or update tests in tests/ mirroring the app/ structure.
customInstructions.migration: Run 'python manage.py makemigrations && python manage.py migrate' after model changes.

*.environmentInstructions: Read AGENTS.md in the project root for complete project conventions.
